top_signals.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Polls Say American Pride Depends on How You Ask
top_signals.summary: Between June 8th and 11th, NPR/PBS/Marist conducted a poll of 1,340 adults and found thatAmericans remain broadly proud of their country, but views on patriotism, the nation's future and trust in government are increasingly divided along partisan lines, even as overall levels of national pride have changed little over time. Director at the Eagleton Center for Public Interest at Rutgers Ashley Connan and Puck News writer Abby Livingston join Bloomberg This Weekend and analyze more of the poll data with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
